title: Detached Instance Audit

Module docstring usage example still shows old metadata= keyword arg

fixes.issue: Bare session.refresh(product) in test fixture — could cause DetachedInstanceError if tests access relationship attrs

summary: Full codebase audit of all session.refresh() calls (40+ across src/ and api/). Found 8 issues: 6 bare Product refreshes in product_service.py (already fixed in uncommitted changes from prior session), 1 outdated metadata= docstring in download_tokens.py, and 1 bare Product refresh in test conftest. All fixed. No remaining metadata= callers, no token_info.get('metadata') patterns, no frontend field mismatches. All Product service methods use selectinload for eager loading. Non-Product refresh calls (User, AgentJob, AgentExecution, Project, etc.) verified safe — their models have no 0840 relationships that are accessed post-session.
